subject: Improve anti-staging checker.
commit_message:
Improve anti-staging checker.

Checking if images are in release repository.

Signed-off-by: Jakub Latusek <j.latusek@samsung.com>
Issue-ID: OOM-2616
Change-Id: Ibb4f7e51fb3a1afcebaecd04ca3e1a4bf62dd467

Patch Set 7:

Verified manually on a recent master branch:
[ERROR] Only release images are allowed in helm charts.
[ERROR] Images not found in release repo:
onap/org.onap.dcaegen2.deployments.pnda-bootstrap-container:6.0.0
onap/org.onap.dcaegen2.deployments.pnda-mirror-container:6.0.0
onap/so/so-etsi-nfvo-ns-lcm:1.7.4
Makefile:101: recipe for target 'check-for-staging-images' failed
make: *** [check-for-staging-images] Error 1

results are aligned with expectations
Change has been successfully merged by Krzysztof Opasiak

Patch Set 7:

> Patch Set 7:
> 
> Verified manually on a recent master branch:
> [ERROR] Only release images are allowed in helm charts.
> [ERROR] Images not found in release repo:
> onap/org.onap.dcaegen2.deployments.pnda-bootstrap-container:6.0.0
> onap/org.onap.dcaegen2.deployments.pnda-mirror-container:6.0.0
> onap/so/so-etsi-nfvo-ns-lcm:1.7.4
> Makefile:101: recipe for target 'check-for-staging-images' failed
> make: *** [check-for-staging-images] Error 1
> 
> results are aligned with expectations

I propose to start to work on adding to jjb but to merge (the jjb change) only when we have solved the initial problem (so no more "staging" images first)

Patch Set 7:

> Patch Set 7:
> 
> > Patch Set 7:
> > 
> > Verified manually on a recent master branch:
> > [ERROR] Only release images are allowed in helm charts.
> > [ERROR] Images not found in release repo:
> > onap/org.onap.dcaegen2.deployments.pnda-bootstrap-container:6.0.0
> > onap/org.onap.dcaegen2.deployments.pnda-mirror-container:6.0.0
> > onap/so/so-etsi-nfvo-ns-lcm:1.7.4
> > Makefile:101: recipe for target 'check-for-staging-images' failed
> > make: *** [check-for-staging-images] Error 1
> > 
> > results are aligned with expectations
> 
> I propose to start to work on adding to jjb but to merge (the jjb change) only when we have solved the initial problem (so no more "staging" images first)

My idea was to create a second jenkins job so that it doesn't prevent full build even through there are some staging images and for now just merge patches even if this job is failed.

This way I would not need to run this manually on dozen of reviews every day...
What do you think?

Patch Set 7:

> Patch Set 7:
> 
> > Patch Set 7:
> > I propose to start to work on adding to jjb but to merge (the jjb change) only when we have solved the initial problem (so no more "staging" images first)
> 
> My idea was to create a second jenkins job so that it doesn't prevent full build even through there are some staging images and for now just merge patches even if this job is failed.
> 
> This way I would not need to run this manually on dozen of reviews every day...
> What do you think?

From what I understand from Jenkins "by LF IT", I believe all JJB are done with the same "jobbuilder".
It means that we'll have a "verify -1" for all dockers as long as the 3 dockers are still there / are using a snapshot image
